content:
- All required gates passed for task 03: make check, make test, make test-long, and make lint.
- Marked the task file done with passes=true and ran .ralph/task_switch.sh successfully.
- Next is final bookkeeping only: inspect git status, commit every tracked/untracked change including .ralph metadata with the required task-finished message, push, and stop immediately.

- Finished task 03 completely. The task file is marked done with passes=true, .ralph/task_switch.sh has run, the work is committed on master as 07349fc, and git push succeeded.
- Required verification all passed in this cycle: make check, make test, make test-long, make lint.
- Stop immediately. The next cycle should start from the new current task pointer, not reopen task 03.

- Read previous progress log, `.ralph/current_tasks.md`, and `.ralph/current_tasks_done.md` to apply the chooser rules strictly.
- Confirmed there are no active failing bug tasks. The only elevated-priority unblocked failing tasks are `.ralph/tasks/story-authoritative-managed-postgres-config/04-task-migrate-harness-tests-and-docs-to-the-authoritative-managed-conf-model.md` and `.ralph/tasks/story-authoritative-managed-postgres-config/05-task-centralize-composable-sample-runtime-config-builders-for-tests.md`.
- Resolved blockers from `.ralph/current_tasks_done.md`: backup-removal tasks 01/02/04/05 are done, and authoritative managed-conf tasks 01/02/03 are done, so both 04 and 05 are selectable.
- Chose task 05 next because it provides the shared runtime-config builder layer that task 04’s harness/test migration can build on, reducing duplicate fixture churn and avoiding reworking the same test files twice.
- Next immediate action is to write `.ralph/tasks/story-authoritative-managed-postgres-config/05-task-centralize-composable-sample-runtime-config-builders-for-tests.md` into `.ralph/current_task.txt` and quit.

- Read prior codex progress log and confirmed the previous cycle finished task 03 cleanly.
- Resolved the new current task pointer to .ralph/tasks/story-authoritative-managed-postgres-config/05-task-centralize-composable-sample-runtime-config-builders-for-tests.md.
- Next I am reading that task file to determine whether I need to write the first detailed plan, review an existing TO BE VERIFIED plan, or execute a locked NOW EXECUTE plan.

- Read the active task 05 file and confirmed it was still before the first lifecycle marker, so this pass had to stop at planning.
- Inspected the existing RuntimeConfig fixture duplication across src/tests/examples plus the test_harness visibility and contributor docs.
- Wrote a detailed plan into .ralph/tasks/story-authoritative-managed-postgres-config/05-task-centralize-composable-sample-runtime-config-builders-for-tests.md, including a concrete shared-module design, exhaustive migration checklist, execution order, docs touchpoints, and verification risks.
- Added the required TO BE VERIFIED marker at the end of the plan.
- Stop now. The next cycle should read the task file, perform the skeptical TO BE VERIFIED review, alter at least one concrete plan item, replace the marker with NOW EXECUTE when satisfied, and only then execute.

- Read the task 05 file in TO BE VERIFIED state and did the required skeptical review against the real schema and representative helper call sites.
- Changed the plan concretely before approval: added section-transform override methods to the shared RuntimeConfigBuilder plan, added missing override seams like dcs.init and extra_gucs, moved src/postgres_managed.rs into the first migration wave, and narrowed src/test_harness/ha_e2e/startup.rs to shared fragments/transform methods while keeping topology wiring explicit.
- Replaced the end marker with NOW EXECUTE.
- Stop now. The next cycle should read the same task file, see NOW EXECUTE, avoid further exploration, and execute the plan as written while ticking task boxes and running the full required gates.

- Read the Ralph progress log and current task pointer.
- Confirmed the active task is .ralph/tasks/story-authoritative-managed-postgres-config/05-task-centralize-composable-sample-runtime-config-builders-for-tests.md.
- Next I am reading the task file to confirm whether it is in planning, TO BE VERIFIED, or NOW EXECUTE state so I can follow the required workflow exactly.

- Read the active task file and confirmed it is in NOW EXECUTE.
- Started execution with the first planned step: reading the real config types, validation entrypoint, and test_harness module so the shared builder matches the current schema instead of guessing.
- Next I will add src/test_harness/runtime_config.rs with the composable builder and self-tests, then export it.

- Added the shared src/test_harness/runtime_config.rs module and exported it from src/test_harness/mod.rs.
- Migrated a first wave of duplicated helpers in api, dcs, ha, logging, runtime, tests, examples, and postgres_managed to thin wrappers over RuntimeConfigBuilder.
- Next I am checking for any remaining direct RuntimeConfig literals in the planned target files and then I will convert the ha_e2e harness constructor to layer topology-specific overrides on the shared builder.

- Finished the shared runtime-config builder implementation, migrated the planned helpers and targeted inline literals, updated contributor docs, and converted the ha_e2e harness path to layer topology-specific overrides over the shared builder.
- Verified the work with targeted cargo tests plus the required full gates: make check, make test, make test-long, and make lint; all passed cleanly.
- Updated the task 05 file to done/passes=true and checked off the acceptance and execution checklists. Next is final Ralph bookkeeping: run .ralph/task_switch.sh, commit all files including .ralph metadata with the required task-finished message, push, and stop immediately.
